title: Ability for the "vote" column to accept multiple votes per team member
excerpt: It would be helpful if team members could upvote an item. Right now, you can only click vote one time on the “vote” column.

posts.author: Melanie (Melanie)
posts.cookedHtml: It would be helpful if team members could upvote an item. Right now, you can only click vote one time on the “vote” column.

posts.author: harold07douglas (Harold Douglas)
posts.cookedHtml: It would be really useful if team members could upvote an item multiple times to indicate a higher level of support or priority. This could give a more nuanced view of what items are truly most important or urgent for the team. Right now, having a single vote can be limiting, especially when there are multiple people with different opinions. Allowing for multiple votes could help identify consensus more effectively and streamline decision-making.
